id.description: The identifier of the exercise request that initiated the exercise.

sharesAcquiredDatetime.description: The date and time the shares were acquired by the beneficial owner.

quantity.description: The number of shares converted as part of exercising the option.

exerciseMethod.description: How the exercise cost was funded. May be absent if the exercise method could not be determined. See `OptionExerciseMethod` for all supported values.

recordType.description: The tax classification of the exercise. May differ from the grant's stock option type (e.g., an ISO grant may have an NSO exercise due to a disqualifying disposition). See `StockOptionType` for all supported values.

resultingSecurityId.description: The identifier of the security produced as a result of the exercise.

resultingSecurityType.description: The type of the security produced as a result of the exercise (e.g. "certificate").

resultingSecurityLabel.description: The human-readable label of the security produced as a result of the exercise (e.g. "CS-42").

schema_def.description: An exercise transaction for an option grant. Represents the conversion of options into shares.
